description.unified: Drops 5 lightning bolts upon a random enemy, dealing ??? M.DMG and inflicting Electrify. Electrified enemy is stunned for [2 sec->3 sec].
HP of all allies is healed by ??? for [6 sec->5 sec]. For the duration of Skill, Kaulah [cannot perform other actions -> gains immunity to CC] and takes [60% Magic -> 50% All] reduced DMG.
For 15 sec, increases all allies' ATK by ???, ATK Spd by [42%->350], and Crit Chance by [150->350].

Deals ??? M.DMG to 4 enemies every 15 sec, inflicting them with Electric shock for 20 sec, and inflicting stun for [0.6 sec->1 sec] upon a Critical Hit. Enemies inflicted with Electric Shock take a total of ??? M.DMG over 20 sec. For every enemy under Electric, Kaulah takes 15% reduced DMG. This effect can be stacked up to max 3 times and is irremovable.

dark.unified: Target takes [10%->25%] increased M.DMG for 10 sec.

light.unified: Allies take [(added) 25%] less DMG while skill is in effect. [You are immune to status ailments while casting -> (removed) You are immune to status ailments while casting].

dark.unified: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, additionally heal allies by 5% of their Max HP.

light.unified: Recovers [1000->1 orb of] Mana for all allies.

description.unified: [Swift Wind] Mana cost is reduced by 1, and Crit DMG {0}% boost effect is added.

dark.unified: When taking DMG, decreases ATK Spd of the attacking enemy by [200->300] for 5 sec and its Mana by [100->200] every sec. This effect is activated only once every 5 sec.

description.unified: Normal attacks have a {0}% chance to deal M.DMG equal to {1}% of ATK and inflicts against 2 random enemies and reduce their ATK by {2}%. If the target is already inflicted with Electric Shock, stuns the target for [0.5 sec->2 sec].
